name: Ridgeline Minerals Corp.
description: Ridgeline Minerals Corp. is a Canada-based resource company focused on the exploration of precious and base metal deposits in the western United States. The company leverages advanced technology, extensive geological experience, and strategic partnerships to identify and develop high-potential projects. Its diverse portfolio includes assets such as the Selena, Swift, and Black Ridge projects, where it aims to create significant shareholder value through efficient exploration and new discoveries. By maintaining carried interests in its projects, Ridgeline ensures continued exposure to exploration upside while collaborating with industry partners to advance its mineral assets toward production.
